title: lamium montanum subsp. endtmannii
intro: Lamium montanum subsp. endtmannii, also known as mountain lamium or mountain deadnettle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is also said to possess health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lamium montanum subsp. endtmannii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
